title: Senior Financial Analyst - ICICI Prudential Life Global Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - ICICI Prudential Life Global Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ICICI Prudential Life Global Group! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Hyderabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ICICI Prudential Life Global Group:
ICICI Prudential Life Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Prudential Life Global Group!
